channel.title: Radiochimica Acta
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Radiochimica Acta

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Khadour Said, Taha Yaseen Wais, Hassanain H. Al-Kazzaz, El Boukili Abderrahman, Laith A. Najam, Lhoucine Oufni, Moulay Brahim Sedra, Moha Amrane, M. I. Sayyed, Abdelmoneim Saleh, Howaida Mansour, Joseph Emmanuel Ndjana Nkoulou II DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2025-frontmatter3

item.title: Single-atom-at-a-time adsorption studies of 211Bi and its precursor 211Pb on SiO2 surfaces
item.description: Article by Khadour Said, Taha Yaseen Wais, Hassanain H. Al-Kazzaz, El Boukili Abderrahman, Laith A. Najam, Lhoucine Oufni, Moulay Brahim Sedra, Moha Amrane, M. I. Sayyed, Abdelmoneim Saleh, Howaida Mansour, Joseph Emmanuel Ndjana Nkoulou II DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0327

item.title: Uptake of Eu, Th, U, and Pu by granite and biotite gneiss in Korean fresh groundwater under oxidizing and reducing conditions
item.description: Article by Khadour Said, Taha Yaseen Wais, Hassanain H. Al-Kazzaz, El Boukili Abderrahman, Laith A. Najam, Lhoucine Oufni, Moulay Brahim Sedra, Moha Amrane, M. I. Sayyed, Abdelmoneim Saleh, Howaida Mansour, Joseph Emmanuel Ndjana Nkoulou II DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0331

item.title: A new targetry system for cyclotron production of pharmaceutical grade indium-111 radioisotope
item.description: Article by Khadour Said, Taha Yaseen Wais, Hassanain H. Al-Kazzaz, El Boukili Abderrahman, Laith A. Najam, Lhoucine Oufni, Moulay Brahim Sedra, Moha Amrane, M. I. Sayyed, Abdelmoneim Saleh, Howaida Mansour, Joseph Emmanuel Ndjana Nkoulou II DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0353

item.title: Hierarchical macro/mesoporous γ-Al2O3 as column matrix for development of low specific activity 99Mo/99mTc generator via 100Mo (γ, n)99Mo reaction
item.description: Article by Khadour Said, Taha Yaseen Wais, Hassanain H. Al-Kazzaz, El Boukili Abderrahman, Laith A. Najam, Lhoucine Oufni, Moulay Brahim Sedra, Moha Amrane, M. I. Sayyed, Abdelmoneim Saleh, Howaida Mansour, Joseph Emmanuel Ndjana Nkoulou II DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0320

item.title: Design of a novel complex 99mTc-Nilutamide as a tracer for prostate cancer disorder detection in mice
item.description: Article by Khadour Said, Taha Yaseen Wais, Hassanain H. Al-Kazzaz, El Boukili Abderrahman, Laith A. Najam, Lhoucine Oufni, Moulay Brahim Sedra, Moha Amrane, M. I. Sayyed, Abdelmoneim Saleh, Howaida Mansour, Joseph Emmanuel Ndjana Nkoulou II DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0303

item.title: Dehydration of un-irradiated and gamma and electron-beam irradiated europium acetate hydrate under non-isothermal conditions: kinetics of the dehydration process of un-irradiated material
item.description: Article by Khadour Said, Taha Yaseen Wais, Hassanain H. Al-Kazzaz, El Boukili Abderrahman, Laith A. Najam, Lhoucine Oufni, Moulay Brahim Sedra, Moha Amrane, M. I. Sayyed, Abdelmoneim Saleh, Howaida Mansour, Joseph Emmanuel Ndjana Nkoulou II DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0317

item.title: Radiochromic liquid dosimeter based on p-arsanilic acid for gamma radiation monitoring
item.description: Article by Khadour Said, Taha Yaseen Wais, Hassanain H. Al-Kazzaz, El Boukili Abderrahman, Laith A. Najam, Lhoucine Oufni, Moulay Brahim Sedra, Moha Amrane, M. I. Sayyed, Abdelmoneim Saleh, Howaida Mansour, Joseph Emmanuel Ndjana Nkoulou II DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0359

item.title: Assessing carcinogenic radon levels in water from Er-Rachidia, Morocco using LR-115 nuclear track detectors
item.description: Article by Khadour Said, Taha Yaseen Wais, Hassanain H. Al-Kazzaz, El Boukili Abderrahman, Laith A. Najam, Lhoucine Oufni, Moulay Brahim Sedra, Moha Amrane, M. I. Sayyed, Abdelmoneim Saleh, Howaida Mansour, Joseph Emmanuel Ndjana Nkoulou II DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0323
